creator: lars.engels@0x20.net
text:
Fix: Update aircrack-ng to version 0.7.

Changelog: http://aircrack-ng.org/doku.php#changelog

=== Heads Up! ===

On FreeBSD airodump-ng, aireplay-ng and airtun-ng still cannot be built on FreeBSD due to Linux-specific code.
Without these tools aircrack-ng is not very useful. If you like to help porting the missing tools, please read
http://tinyshell.be/aircrackng/forum/index.php?topic=1019 or contact me via email.
Thank you for your help!
